heading: Effective period
label: 1510 Effective period
notes: References in TextThe amendments made by this subchapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “the amendments made by this title”, meaning title I of div. N of , which is classified generally to this subchapter.Pub. L. 114–113
amendments: References in TextThe amendments made by this subchapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “the amendments made by this title”, meaning title I of div. N of , which is classified generally to this subchapter.Pub. L. 114–113

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), this subchapter and the amendments made by this subchapter shall be effective during the period beginning on and ending on .December 18, 2015September 30, 2026

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: With respect to any action authorized by this subchapter or information obtained pursuant to an action authorized by this subchapter, which occurred before the date on which the provisions referred to in subsection (a) cease to have effect, the provisions of this subchapter shall continue in effect.
